title: Korbond Hemming Web 10m x 2cm - White – Invisible Mending Tape for Fabric - Iron On Hem Tape - NO Sewing Required Adhesive Fabric Tape, Webbing Tape, Hemming Tape
features: NO SEWING: Korbond Hemming Web is an iron on hemming tape, a sew-free solution for hemming and bonding fabrics and garments with ease.
EXTRA STRONG: This hem tape is the perfect fabric tape adhesive for hemming weighty curtains and upholstery, providing a reliable hold.
MULTI USE: Versatile iron hemming tape for trousers, jeans, work trousers, suits, dresses, badges, and school uniforms.
EASY TO USE: This fabric tape adhesive works with a standard iron and ironing cloth. Fold fabric over the webbing tape, iron through the cloth, and follow the instructions on the pack.
MACHINE WASHABLE: Korbond 10m seam tape is machine washable at 40 degrees. Do not tumble dry the webbing tape.
description: Product Description NO SEWING Korbond Hemming Web is an iron hemming tape, a sew-free solution for hemming and bonding fabrics and garments with ease. STRONG HEM TAPE This hem tape is perfect for hemming weighty curtains and upholstery, providing a reliable hold. EASY TO USE The fabric tape adhesive works with an iron and ironing cloth. Fold fabric over the webbing tape, iron through the cloth, and follow the instructions. MACHINE WASHABLE Korbond seam tape is machine washable at 40 degrees. Do not tumble dry. Yes, Korbond Hemming Web is washable at 40 degrees. Do not tumble dry. How do you use the Hemming Web? Full instructions are provided in pack. 1.Iron fabric to crease the hem. 2. Cut web to length and place between the fold. 3. Set iron to a hot temperature and a low steam setting 4. Press iron over hem for approx. 20 seconds. Allow to cool. What fabrics can Korbond Adhesive Fabric Tape be used on? Always test the web on an inconspicuous area first. Korbond Hem Tape can be used on most fabrics. but is most effective on cotton, linen and viscose fabrics. Is the Hem Tape suitable to repair torn fabric? No, this product is for the creation of hems or the bonding of two fabrics on top of one another such as affixing school badges to uniforms. Instead, Korbond Instant Repair Tape is designed to mend damaged fabrics. Is Korbond Hemming Web a permanent bond? Yes, Korbond Hemming web is designed to create a permanent bond and is not removable.
